review_title: Simplified AI is simply the best
description: Simplified always beats my expectations each time I use it, it's so good I'll always choose it over chatgpt
author: Abbah C.
pros: I like everything about simplified, I'll always choose it over chatgpt all the time
cons: It's limitations, I wish it was free just like meta AI, otherwise it's perfect as is

review_title: Very rich in offerings but needs to be beginner friendly
description: App.Simplified offers a wide range of AI solutions, making it an incredible value for the price. That said, once you get used to it, it becomes easier. On the bright side, their support team is excellent—real people, not bots, respond quickly to queries. If they could improve the user experience and make it more intuitive, I’d happily give them a 5-star rating.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The number of mini-apps within the suite is a plus
cons: Complicated to use at first and the app sometimes struggles to do what it is meant to do.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It was very easy to use and i can easily understands all the tools workings and it was very fast and realistic
cons: trail option was not working in my scenerio . and no one replied when i asked about my problem in the chat

review_title: Absolutely terrible app and customer service. Stay AWAY!
author: Lana M.
pros: None. Absolutely the worst application. Nothing good about it.
cons: This is the worst app with a bunch of bugs. The customer service is absolutely terrible. They don't even respond emails. I sent multiple emails requesting my refund because i cancelled the subscription the next day I signed up due to bugs and poor performance and they never responded. I contacted through chat as well with someone named [SENSITIVE CONTENT] who said she will get back to me but never did. I keep sending her texts and I can see she reads them but never responds. Please use CANVA instead!! Better features, user friendly, cheaper and great customer service.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very good and pleasant ! Makes great videos! Fast at making your videos for you! Would recommend to anyone

author: Surached W.
pros: I must say, AI is truly impressive. Its ability to provide insightful answers, adapt to complex topics, and assist with various tasks is nothing short of remarkable. It's like having a knowledgeable companion available anytime
cons: AI is undoubtedly impressive, but it does have its limitations. Sometimes it lacks the human touch when understanding nuanced emotions or cultural contexts. Additionally, it can occasionally provide outdated or overly generic information. Balancing AI efficiency with human creativity is still essential

description: I've uncovered the path to perfect organization with the Simplified platform! 🚀✨ Its ingenious innovations and impeccable design have revolutionized the way I approach task and project management. Each image and feature is meticulously crafted, offering a visually stunning and highly functional experience.
author: Guilherme S.
pros: Simplified's flawless visuals aren't just a feast for the eyes; they're also a strategic tool for productivity. Every graph and illustration work in harmony with the functionalities, making the planning and execution process smoother and more efficient.Simplicity meets brilliance: Simplified has managed to discover the magical formula of blending simplicity with ingenuity, turning each step toward my goals into an incredibly exhilarating journey. Each feature is a testament to the platform's commitment to providing the best possible experience, facilitating the achievement of goals and accomplishments.Since I started using Simplified, my productivity has reached astonishing levels, and my goals are closer than ever. If you're also in search of a revolutionary way to work, create, and achieve, Simplified is the answer. Get ready to be captivated by the perfect combination of stunning visuals and innovations that will transform your journey toward success."
cons: Embarking on an incredible journey through the Simplified platform and falling in love with every detail! 💼✨ The only minor consideration is that complete freedom isn't free. However, I fully comprehend the need to keep this amazing platform running flawlessly and brimming with innovative features.It's easy to see that behind each perfect image and every ingenious innovation, there's a dedicated team working tirelessly to provide us with the best possible experience. After all, great ideas and revolutionary resources deserve recognition.Nevertheless, when weighing the benefits and enhancements that Simplified brings to both my professional and personal life, the small contribution is worth every penny. I'm more motivated than ever to invest in myself and my growth, and Simplified is the perfect partner on this journey.Therefore, while complete free access might be a wish, I understand the importance of supporting a platform that's truly making a difference. I remain enthusiastic about exploring everything that Simplified has to offer and am eager to see where this journey will take me!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Simplified : easy, fun and simple way to design.
description: The "Simplified" app is an effective app to do your designs. It's user-friendly, attractive, time-efficient and comprehensive. It is an essential too to anyone that need to streamline his life or work. I highly recommend it for everyone.
author: Mohamed E.
pros: - it is an easy to use application which is the most important feature for this app. You don't need to be a professional designer to do the job, with easy navigation through it and you can access all the essential features without any confusion.- A very friendly interface that is vary attractive and shows you all the options you need without too many subcategories or too much dropping lists.- It helped me a lot to do my job in a short time and effective way. It's perfect for time management and by using this app I don't feel the time pressure on doing tasks.- Sharing is very easy. There is no broken links, and you can share with anyone with no delay.- The AI generating tool is very smart and helpful specially when doing quotes to be used on your campaigns.
cons: - Some features doesn't apply exactly as I want but I think it eed some development especially in adjusting the animation of Ads you make.- You need to submit to one of their tiers to get more tools and features. It may be expensive for some people to get features that are present in another apps.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fantastic tool for anyone who wants to optimize their time.
description: I use it to create all posts for social media but also short videos for Tik Tok thanks to its free editor. Also perfect for generating texts to write on my E-Commerce to describe the various products
author: Ettore L.
pros: I love the possibility of generating long and short texts to use for the caption of my posts and to write small articles. The ability to choose numerous categorized templates is a great thing and I always find what I need to edit in a few minutes. Good also for video editng.I make some beautiful pins to post on Pinterest. I can also view various social data analytics in the dashboard
cons: its AI writing could be slightly improved but in any case it works well.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Incredible all in one tool for content management and social media
description: Really powerful platform for our business. We use it for all our content marketing and particularly short animated videos for social media
author: Jonathan W.
pros: The animation tools and effects are much better than other products we have used such as Adobe Spark and Canva. Produces short animated videos quickly. Some nice text animations. Being able to order the timing of animations is a key feature. Artboards have some excellent functionality. Good range of editing tools. Amazing that you get a background remover. Loads of tools in one program. Can't think of another platform that gives you all these functions in one place. Quite an achievement.
cons: As the software is pretty new, there are some glitches which will need to be ironed out. Customer support have been great at fixing these however.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

cons: The credits situation. We love the tool, but paying the monthly fee, exhausting credits and then expecting us to pay more for extra is not a great situation
